title: Polish Stuffed Cabbage Soup (Zupa Gołąbkowa)
description: A cozy, one-pot Polish soup that combines ground meat, cabbage, rice, tomatoes, and simple herbs in a rich broth.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add ground pork and cook for 6-8 minutes until browned, breaking it into small pieces.
Add leek, white onion, and butter. Cook for 5 minutes until vegetables soften.
Stir in grated carrot, salt, pepper, paprika, oregano, and thyme. Cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in hot broth and bring to a gentle boil. Stir in chopped cabbage and white rice. Cover and simmer gently for 15 minutes.
Mix in canned tomatoes and tomato paste. Cook for 3 minutes over low to medium heat.
Turn off the heat and stir in chopped dill. Let sit for 3-5 minutes before serving.
